name: Roasted Zucchini with Queso Quesadilla & Cotija
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Cacique brand Cotija Cheese, crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Slice the zucchini into 1/8-inch thick slices, starting at the stem end.
3. Lightly coat the slices with oil and season with salt and pepper.
4. Roast the zucchini in the middle of the oven for about 10 to 15 minutes.
5. While roasting, melt the Queso Quesadilla in the microwave.
6. Place the roasted zucchini on plates.
7. Pour the melted cheese over the zucchini and sprinkle with Cotija.
